mapper.select:
(SELECT 1 AS "type", a.article_id AS "id", a.title AS "title", a.summary AS "desc", a.cover_image AS "image" FROM article a WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.category_id != 1 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%')) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})
UNION ALL
(SELECT 2 AS "type", w.work_id AS "id", w.title AS "title", w.description AS "desc", SUBSTRING_INDEX(w.images, ',', 1) AS "image" FROM user_work w WHERE w.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR w.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') ORDER BY w.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})
UNION ALL
(SELECT 3 AS "type", c.course_id AS "id", c.title AS "title", c.description AS "desc", c.cover_image AS "image" FROM course c WHERE c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})
UNION ALL
(SELECT 4 AS "type", p.post_id AS "id", SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 50) AS "title", SUBSTRING(p.content, 1, 100) AS "desc", SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.images, ',', 1) AS "image" FROM post p WHERE p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') ORDER BY p.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})
UNION ALL
(SELECT 5 AS "type", a.article_id AS "id", a.title AS "title", a.summary AS "desc", a.cover_image AS "image" FROM article a WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.category_id = 1 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{kw}, '%')) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit})
